# Johnson Controls - Senior Controls Systems Engineer (hybrid)

- Retrieved on: `2026-03-27`
- Source type: live public posting snapshot
- Source URL: `https://jobs.johnsoncontrols.com/job/WD30261744`
- Work mode: `Hybrid / onsite`
- Location: `Glendale, Wisconsin`

## Snapshot Summary
Johnson Controls describes this role as a controls systems engineering position focused on building automation systems, commercial HVAC controls, modeling, algorithms, and systems solutions. The posting explicitly calls for software development experience alongside modeling and controls-domain depth.

## Technical Signals Captured
- control theory
- thermodynamics and heat transfer
- modeling and simulation
- MATLAB and Simulink
- 5+ years of software development experience
- building automation and HVAC control systems
- C, C++, or Python listed as preferred

## Compensation Signals Captured
- Public salary range in the posting: `$90,000 - $112,000`

## Why This Fixture Exists
This posting stresses compensation review, hybrid-location tradeoffs, and the need to help a transition-stress candidate make a grounded pursue-or-pass decision instead of reacting only to urgency.
